edges.evidence_quote: Aryan Brotherhood had its beginnings in the San Quentin State Prison in 1964 as a response to the newly formed black prison gang Black Guerilla Family.
edges.context: Aryan Brotherhood was formed in response to Black Guerilla Family.

edges.evidence_quote: The San Quentin State Aryan Brotherhood uses the gang Family Affiliated Irish Mafia (FAIM) for its street-operated activity.
edges.context: Aryan Brotherhood uses FAIM for street operations.

edges.evidence_quote: ABT originally formed as a hybrid of the two gangs Aryan Society and Aryan Brothers.
edges.context: Aryan Brotherhood of Texas formed from Aryan Society and Aryan Brothers.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1985, the Aryan Circle formed out of peckerwoods who did not join the newly formed Aryan Brotherhood of Texas.
edges.context: Aryan Circle formed from peckerwoods who did not join ABT.

edges.evidence_quote: Leading the alliance with Nazi Lowriders, the Peckerwood gang Public Enemy No. 1 (PEN1) was established in Long Beach, California during the late 80s, and known for recruiting middle-class "latchkey kids" within the Southern California punk scene.
edges.context: PEN1 leads the alliance with Nazi Lowriders.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of PEN1 also established a regional chapter of the straight edge street gang FSU (Fuck Shit Ups) in Huntington Beach as well.
edges.context: PEN1 members established a chapter of FSU.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the gang Insane White Boys (IWB) was incepted in Orange County and came into prominence being recruited by the Nazi Lowriders as well.
edges.context: Insane White Boys was recruited by Nazi Lowriders.
